## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes with no errors
- [ ] No Tailwind, Bootstrap, or Bulma class names appear in `dist/velora.css`
- [ ] All new classes use the `vel-` prefix
- [ ] All new CSS custom properties use the `--vel-` prefix
- [ ] Docs page added or updated if the change affects public API
- [ ] `nextjs-demo/app/docs/_data/nav.ts` updated if a new docs page was added
